rulings.Case Title: LANIER WORLDWIDE VS FIRST UNION BAPTIST
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: HEARING REQUIRED. PARTIES TO PROVIDE COURT OF APPEALS OPINION AND REMAND. IN ADDITION PARTIES TO BRING TO HEARING COPIES OF COURT APPEALS BRIEF OPENING, OPPOSING & REPLY AS WELL AS ORDER OF JUDGE QUIDACHAY AWARDING $4,180.00 IN ATTORNEY FEES. (NR)

rulings.Case Title: ROSS VS ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)*
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED.

rulings.Case Title: WAGNER VS A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES, INC*
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Ntc Of Mo For Order Granting Summary Judgment *** $100.00 Summ Judg Mo Fee Paid Receipt # 521731 ***
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY ACANDS DENIED. TATE DECLARATION CREATES TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED BECAUSE TRIAL SET FOR 12/10. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY FLUOR DENIED TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CREATED BY PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION AND GOSNEY DECLARATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED AS TO NEGLIGENT HIRING, STRICT LIABILITY AND FALSE REPRESENTATION. DEFENDANT'S SEPARTE STATEMENT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CRC 342. DEFENDANT HAS NEGLECTED TO ATTACH INTERROGATORIES OR TO HIGHLIGHT WHICH RESPONSES SUPPORT WHAT UNDISPUTED FACTS. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY USX DENIED TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CREATED BY WILLIAMS DECLARATION. PACIFIC MECHANICAL - O/C, DEFT DISMISSED. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: PAJARO VALLEY VS COMMUNITY HEALTH
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO AMEND. MOVING PARTY TO BRING COPIES OF MOVING PAPERS TO HEARING INCLUDING PROPOSED PLEADING. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: HEINZ VS AMERICAN TRANS AIR INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Ntc Of Mo To Stay Or Dismiss Action
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO QUASH. DEFENDANT'S DOMICILE WAS NOT IN CALIFORNIA AT TIME FILED SEE HOERLER VS. SUPERIOR COURT 85CAL.APP.3D 533. DEFENDANT LACKS SUFFICIENT MINIMUM CONTACTS TO ASSERT PERSONAL JURISDICTION BECAUSE ACTS DID NOT OCCUR IN CALIFORNIA AND CONTACTS INSUFFICIENT FOR SPECIFIC JURISDICTION. MOTION TO STAY OR DISMISS OFF CALENDAR MOOT. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: BOULLARD VS ROYAL MOTORS
rulings.Calendar Matter: For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment;
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR, CASE SETTLED.

rulings.Case Title: DEWAR VS HERBERT
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Mo For Order Permitting 2nd Amended Complt
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR, ON 11/19 THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER & ORDERED COURTESY COPIES. THE PARTIES FAILED TO COMPLY.

rulings.Case Title: NIITSUMA VS ACADEMY OF ART COLLEGE
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF ORAL CONTRACT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. COMPLAINT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF WRITTEN CONTRACT SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE IMPLIED CONTRACT INCORPORATING TERMS OF WRITTEN CONTRACT BASED ON CONTINUED PAYMENT AND ACCEPTANCE OF TUITION. DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION COMMON COUNTS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. (CW)
